checks.grade_score_internal_consistency: PASS (all 92 grades match engine score_to_grade() / GRADE_THRESHOLDS S90/A80/B65/C50/D35)
checks.four_constructs_applied: PASS (granola subpool, children's, whole-grain MDF, fortification — all populated per product + category rollup)

hard_fails.detail: 7 real cereals route outside the cereal family: spelt flakes (כוסמין מלא 100%, פתיתים אורגנים כוסמין) -> bread (2); nut-dense muesli/granola + honey Cheerios (מוזלי בוטנים+שקדים, מוזלי קראנצ'י, צ'יריוס דבש+שקדים) -> whole_food_fat (3); corn/rice rings (דגני טבעות תירס ואורז) -> beverage (1); kids nougat pillows (כריות נוגט) -> whole_food_fat (1).
hard_fails.root_cause: Router v2 has no strong cereal anchor; 'כוסמין'/whole-grain matrix reads as bread, and nut tokens trigger whole_food_fat contamination (documented known router gap in scoring.md). Same CLASS as the run_yogurt_003 19% misroute.
hard_fails.remediation: SCOPED ROUTER FOLLOW-UP (engine change — OUT OF SCOPE for this data-pipeline task; must not be hand-tuned here). Add a cereal anchor that survives grain/nut tokens (carry a category prior from the BSIP0 cereal-shelf acquisition query, mirroring the yogurt router recommendation). Re-run after fix.
hard_fails.score_impact: whole_food_fat routing uses a lenient calorie table and can inflate grades: 'פתיתים אורגנים כוסמין' shows A(81.5) under bread routing — a misroute-influenced grade. Do NOT ship the affected rows.

warnings.detail: 4 shaped baked-flake cereals (פתיתים אפויים כוכבים/טבעות/אורז/קוסקוס) read NOVA 1 -> 85/A. Shaped baked/extruded flakes are plausibly NOVA 3, not NOVA 1. Possible NOVA-proxy under-call on minimal-ingredient shaped cereals. The 2 plain whole-oat A's (שיבולת שועל עבה, קוואקר שיבולת שועל, NOVA 1/85) ARE legitimate (single-ingredient whole grain, milk-precedent-consistent).
warnings.action: Nutrition review at BSIP2 readiness (Stage 6) — does not block the gate by itself, but the 4 baked-flake A's are not Nutrition-approved for display until reviewed.

warnings.detail: scoring.md Grades table (A 85-100 / B 70-84 / C 55-69 / D 40-54 / E 0-39) is STALE vs engine constants.py GRADE_THRESHOLDS (S90/A80/B65/C50/D35). Cereals grades follow the engine constants (correct), but the published doc disagrees. Cross-reference TASK-139A flag (same A-threshold inconsistency, 80 vs 85).
warnings.action: Reconcile scoring.md with constants.py (Nutrition/Product) — affects how A-count is reported across ALL categories, not just cereals.

verdict_detail: Pipeline is data-complete and clean (0 insufficient, 0 errors, 100% coverage, 4 constructs applied), but the misroute <5% exit gate FAILS at 7.6% due to an out-of-scope router cereal-anchor gap. Per run_yogurt_003 discipline, the frontend package is produced as NON-AUTHORITATIVE evidence and NOT promoted to the live site. Two scoped follow-ups (router fix; Nutrition NOVA review of shaped baked flakes) gate live launch.
